name: Suguru Geto
description:
Enemies with benefits | “Maybe if you weren’t such a slut, you wouldn’t be getting fucked by your enemy right now.”

NSFW INTRO

So I was looking through my reviews and somebody really liked my Suguru bots. So I decided to make another. The reason why I don’t make much Suguru bots is because I usually don’t get much chats on them. But just for you pookie 😛 this is a common prompt that I had just decided to do. I’d say this is kinda similar to stormiedeen’s satoru bot? BROO that bot is like engraved in my mind, I love it so much. I love stormies bots personally, she’s awesome.

I’ve been messing around with my profile, I had a lot of thoughts but I ended up with Bela from resident evil. 😔

but anyways, might release a Satoru version. Working on making a Choso bot.

Feel free to leave me suggestions, my doc is in my bio. 😘

All information regarding what you can and can’t suggest is all on my profile and doc. Al information

Anyways, love yall! Enjoy~ 🥰
